name: feature-probe-envelope
$comment: Phase 7 envelope cases. Three POST steps exercise (1) malformed body -> 400 + code:parse_error, (2) unknown action -> 400 + code:unknown_action, (3) uncaught throw -> 500 + code:uncaught_exception. All three share the {ok:false, errors:[...]} shape; only status + code differ. Hosted on FeatureProbe because the dispatch already covers every framework feature and now adds a `boom` action throwing a generic Error. The parse-error step's errors[0].message legitimately differs between .NET System.Text.Json and JS JSON.parse — compareIgnoreFields skips that one field on that one step rather than retroactively rewriting Plan 01's OfParseError factory (D-18: shipped code is locked).
